creator: draco@marino.st
text:
Hmm, gnats did not send me this response, I had to look manually.

This is not easy for me to test, honestly.
Secondly, is that the proper use of WANT_PGSQL_VER ?  I assumed that if 
a range of pgsql was defined, and if the current installation of pgsql 
met that criteria, it would pass the check, otherwise install the pgsql 
default.

I'm not sure about that though -- a FreeBSD ports committer should weigh 
in on the best approach here.  This patch looks a bit funny to me.

John
